name: Prefix-Conditioned Suffix Diffusion
author: Anthony Maio
blurb: True discrete diffusion non-record: prefix-conditioned suffix denoising with absorbing mask process. Not autoregressive — scores via approximate diffusion pseudo-log-likelihood. Achieves diffusion_pll_bpb=1.8587 on 8xH100 in 600s.
notes: Metric is approximate prefix-conditioned diffusion pseudo-log-likelihood BPB, not exact autoregressive challenge BPB.
